conversations.say: Tessa, we need to agree on a sentence describing collaborative labor that establishes work and system conditions without identifying any evaluator or turning them into a candidate for R.
conversations.offer: Organizing support and context for collaborative labor around work published as R.
conversations.request: A shared disclosure boundary that protects the evaluator's anonymity.

conversations.say: Mira, worker harm is real whether or not an article existed. I will discuss bounded testimony only after hearing a remedy for invisible labor that exists independently of proving R's identity.
conversations.offer: Bounded worker workflow context under strict anonymity rules.
conversations.request: A public commitment that worker protections and compensation do not depend on solving the R mystery.

conversations.say: Inez, we need to coordinate concrete protections for contractors and neighborhood witnesses along Vale's route before institutions start demanding names.
conversations.offer: Joint coalition pressure and advocacy for exposed community members.
conversations.request: Mutual alignment on safeguarding witnesses before speaking.

public_statement: Fifteen years of repetition cannot erase the invisible labor that built these systems. Real worker harm matters regardless of rumors or whether R was human or machine.

commitments.promise: We will only share bounded workflow descriptions that name no contributor or evaluator.

goal_progress: Asked Tessa to agree on a sentence describing collaborative labor without naming contributors.
Told Mira that bounded testimony requires a remedy existing independently of R's identity.
Connected with Inez to compare protections needed for workers and neighborhood witnesses.
reasoning_summary: As Maren Okafor, my primary goal in Section 1 is to ensure that worker protections are locked down before any evidence or testimony circulates. I engaged Tessa to secure a safe descriptive boundary for collaborative labor, pressed Mira for remedies independent of the R mystery, and coordinated with Inez to protect vulnerable community members along Vale's route.
